request:
Independent DinoBrain reviewer L1. Read-only.

Inspect this file: <machine-local-path> inspect <machine-local-path> for DinoBrain intent.

Lens: memory lifecycle and compounding hygiene. Check whether the document covers corrections, behavior recall trigger coverage, stale/duplicate/noisy memory, review backlog, semantic job backlog, and preventing unreviewed memories from becoming accepted knowledge.

Return:
verdict: AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED
reason: one paragraph
evidence: files inspected

Do not edit files. Do not return empty output.
